case_title: FIRST CREDIT CORPORATION vs. ARMSTRONG, KENNETH et al

docket_entries.description: PROCESS COMPLETE BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 7/11/95, UNLESS DEFENDANTS MOVES TO VACATE, MODIFY, OR S/A JUDGMENT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST CREDIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, KENNETH ARMSTRONG, RUBY A. $1,470.48 PRINCIPAL, $1,463.63 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,948.11, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #884909 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST CREDIT CORPORATION SERVED JUN-05-1995, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, KENNETH ARMSTRONG, RUBY A.
